Video.summary: Project Leadfoot gets a new roll cage, then upgrades to the lift, suspension, steering and brakes.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Video.summary: Chris and Eric install a 600hp Ford 460 Big Block and Tremec TR4050 into Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Video.summary: Eric and Chris overhaul Project Leadfoot's gauges, build transfer case bracing, and wire it up.
Video.title: Gauges, Wiring, and Welding Galore!

Video.summary: Eric measures Leadfoot's driveshafts; Chris preps the 600hp F-150 with new intake, exhaust, and fuel.
Video.title: Exhausting Exhaust Systems

Video.summary: Our '94 Ford F-150 Leadfoot goes from pickup to beast with crazy mods, a trail shakedown, and a Bigfoot cameo.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot is Complete

Video.summary: We take a 2008 Ford Crown Vic Police Cruiser and turn it into a budget-friendly Spec Panther racing
Video.title: Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade

Image.alt: Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade
Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade
Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade

Video.summary: We continue work on our Ford Crown Vic Police Cruiser Spec Panther race car.
Video.title: Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification

Image.alt: Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification
Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification
Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification

Video.summary: We finish work on our Ford Crown Vic Police Cruiser Spec Panther race car.
Video.title: Spec Panther Race Car Part 3: Paint & Payoff

Image.alt: Spec Panther Race Car Part 3: Paint & Payoff
Spec Panther Race Car Part 3: Paint & Payoff
Spec Panther Race Car Part 3: Paint & Payoff

Video.summary: The guys begin a tribute build to one of the most legendary muscle cars ever made: a 1969 ZL1 COPO Camaro.
Video.title: NOPO to COPO

Video.summary: An all-aluminum ZL1 Big Block gets plugged into the '69 COPO Camaro tribute.
Video.title: NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install

Image.alt: NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install
NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install
NOPO to COPO Engine Swap/Shifter Install

Video.summary: Work continues on the COPO Camaro tribute project as the guys get to work building a new suspension system.
Video.title: COPO Camaro Suspension

Video.summary: The guys plug in their revamped front and rear, then modify the car to accept manual floor pedals.
Video.title: COPO Camaro Gains its Feet

Video.summary: Learn how you can improve on the classic Muncie 4-Speed with modern technology.
Video.title: COPO Camaro 4-Speed Build

Video.summary: The MuscleCar guys work on getting the interior into the 1969 COPO Camaro Tribute project.
Video.title: COPO Interior and Exhaust

Video.summary: We finalize the COPO Camaro by doing a quick rundown on firing a crate motor for the first time.
Video.title: COPO to Go!

Video.summary: Carcass gives you tips on how to repair rusty trouble spots and remove dents on your project.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech

Video.summary: We head out to the junkyard to source a drivetrain for the 1996 Chevy Silverado.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh

Video.summary: What started as a simple “aerosol overhaul” gets more complicated!
Video.title: AMC-Powered Postal Jeep

Video.summary: The Silverado gets buttoned up underneath the hood with cooling and power steering installations.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust

Video.summary: Our '96 Chevy Silverado gets new body parts plus we’ll prep it for paint.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again

Video.summary: The Abandoned Chevy Silverado project is back for mild performance upgrades to the engine.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power

Video.summary: A '78 Postal Jeep gets a second chance.
Video.title: Special Delivery

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets an upgraded suspension that can handle the trails.
Video.title: Junk Mail Suspension

Video.summary: We start the reassembly of our '78 Postal Jeep.
Video.title: Mail Jeep Resurrection

Video.summary: The guys make room on Junk Mail for bigger wheels and tires.
Video.title: Junk Mail Body Mods

Video.summary: We start the final push getting Junk Mail one step closer to the trail.
Video.title: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Image.alt: Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing
Junk Mail Cooling and Fuel Plumbing

Video.summary: Our '78 Postal Jeep gets the interior buttoned up adding shifters and seats.
Video.title: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Image.alt: Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff
Junk Mail Wrap Up and Payoff

Video.summary: We bring Project Junk Mail back into the shop to address some trail problems.
Video.title: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Image.alt: EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails
EFI Swap Lets Junk Mail DJ5 Conquer the Trails

Video.summary: Today our guys are taking some liberties transforming a Jeep Wagoneer into a S-U-V performance beast!
Video.title: TrashHawk

Video.summary: '89 Chevy Silverado sport truck: shakedown run, dyno test, then stripped to the frame for transformation.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 1 Bare Bones

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS Chevy gets suspension mocked up: spring pocket mods, frame work, c-notch, then powder coat.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 2 Chassis Chaos

Video.summary: OBS 632 SS frame mods: boxing plates, fuel tank mockup, clutch install, drivetrain drop.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 3 Building Blocks

Video.summary: The OBS 632 is getting fuel and brake lines, custom exhaust, a stripped cab, and bed mods.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 4 Taking Shape

Video.summary: We build a Ford 9-inch for the OBS Chevy and show an inexpensive interior panel color change.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up
OBS 632 SS Part 5 Color Cover Up

Video.summary: The OBS Chevy chassis is back from powder coat. We start assembly to get the sport truck running again.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required
OBS 632 SS Part 6 Some Assembly Required

Video.summary: Our 632 SS project nears completion with battery relocation, interior refurbishment, and traction control.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse
OBS 632 SS Part 7 Refresh and Reuse

Video.summary: Our 632 Chevy is almost done! We're finishing the interior, adding exterior details, then hitting the road.
Video.title: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Image.alt: OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line
OBS 632 SS Part 8 Sport Truck Assemble/Crossing the Finish Line

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc head out to salvage an old B-Body that has seen better days.
Video.title: Salvage Yard Special

Video.summary: Detroit Muscle begins their journey of bringing a ’69 Plymouth Road Runner back from the brink.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 1: Suspension Tension

Video.summary: Our ’69 Road Runner, nicknamed Road Burner, gets a Gen III Hemi engine swap.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 2: Hemi Heart Transplant

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 2: Hemi Heart Transplant
’69 Road Runner Part 2: Hemi Heart Transplant
’69 Road Runner Part 2: Hemi Heart Transplant

Video.summary: The ’69 Road Runner gets an exterior upgrade.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint
’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint
’69 Road Runner Part 3: To Paint Or Not To Paint

Video.summary: Tommy and Joel give the ’69 Road Runner’s interior a much-needed makeover.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 4: Insider Trading

Video.summary: We make all the right connections and dash towards the finish line our ’69 Road Runner.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish
’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish
’69 Road Runner Part 5: Dash to the Finish

Video.summary: We create a one-of-a-kind emblem and then use some wool to clear up Road Burner’s eyes.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!

Image.alt: ’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!
’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!
’69 Road Runner Part 6: All Systems Go!

Video.summary: We are going to show how mother nature’s handiwork can create a masterpiece worthy of a Hot Wheel.
Video.title: ’69 Road Runner Part 7: School’s Out!

Video.summary: A burned-up 6.4L Gen III HEMI is revived with some old school hot rod parts.
Video.title: Old School/New School HEMI

Video.summary: We visit UNOH where we build and dyno a brutal 434ci UMP Modified dirt track engine.
Video.title: 434ci UMP Race Engine

Video.summary: We revive a 505ci RB Mopar with upgrades and a fresh look, unleashing more power for a hotrod build.
Video.title: 505ci Monster Mopar

Video.summary: Pat & Frankie refresh their 632 BBC for a street rod. New cam, EFI, and more!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 1

Video.summary: 632 BBC dyno time! Forged short block, heads, cam, EFI. Max HP tuning!
Video.title: 632ci EFI BBC Part 2

Video.summary: This old Bronco is start of Project Crazy Horse and Stacey has got a mess on his hands.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Rust Replacement

Video.summary: We enhance Project Crazy Horse with new suspensions, wheels, and an upgraded axle.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Frame & Chassis

Video.summary: We install a new front axle and suspension on Project Crazy Horse, rejuvenating an old Ford Bronco.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Engine

Video.summary: We're revamping a 1966 Ford Bronco with a new engine and drive train, prepping it for the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Drive Train
